test_commands.backend_all: docker compose run --rm web bash -lc "bundle exec rails db:prepare && bundle exec rspec"
test_commands.backend_spec_file: docker compose run --rm web bash -lc "bundle exec rails db:prepare && bundle exec rspec {file}"

test_selection_rules: If backend model changed, run the related model spec if it exists.
If backend controller/API endpoint changed, run the related request/controller spec if it exists.
If serializer/service/job changed, run the related spec if it exists.
If only documentation changed, tests may be skipped with a clear reason.
Do not run the full test suite unless targeted tests cannot reasonably cover the change.
